title: Delicate Crispy French Chickpeas Terrine
description: Sour, crispy chickpeas layered in a terrine, finished with a smoky cumin twist for a light, French-inspired dish.
instructions: Drain and rinse chickpeas, pat dry with paper towel to remove moisture.
In a large skillet, heat olive oil over medium-high heat until shimmering.
Add cumin seeds to the hot oil and toast for 30 seconds until fragrant.
Stir in smoked paprika, salt, and pepper and cook for another 30 seconds.
Add chickpeas to the skillet and toss to coat evenly with the spice mixture.
Cook chickpeas, stirring occasionally, for 8 minutes until they begin to crisp.
Stir in lemon juice, capers, lemon zest, and parsley, and cook for 2 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
Transfer the chickpea mixture into a greased terrine mold or small loaf pan.
Press firmly into the mold and bake in a preheated 220°C oven for 12 minutes to set the terrine.
Remove from oven, let cool for 5 minutes, then unmold and serve warm, garnished with chives.
